title: Sources
doc_html:
§600.74. Sources

            Housing counseling assistance may be provided through private nonprofit organizations certified through the Louisiana Housing Corporation.

            Acts 2007, No. 383, §1, eff. July 10, 2007; Acts 2011, No. 408, §5(B), eff. July 5, 2011.

NOTE: Pursuant to Acts 2007, No. 383, §3, the provisions of this Section ceased to be effective on July 1, 2010.
doc_text:
§600.74.  Sources
Housing counseling assistance may be provided through private nonprofit
organizations certified through the Louisiana Housing Corporation.
Acts 2007, No. 383, §1, eff. July 10, 2007; Acts 2011, No. 408, §5(B), eff. July 5,
2011.
NOTE: Pursuant to Acts 2007, No. 383, §3, the provisions of this Section ceased to be
effective on July 1, 2010.
